$comment: Single source of truth for per-route social metadata. Consumed at runtime by src/seo/SeoTags.tsx (react-helmet-async) and at build time by scripts/prerender-meta.js, which bakes these into static HTML so crawlers that do not run JavaScript resolve the correct tags. Edit here only - do not hand-write these tags into a page.

/.title: Jaranow - Your chores, handled.
/.description: Hand car washing in Gwarinpa and subscription laundry across Abuja. Collected, cleaned and returned - with attention to detail, care and integrity at every step.
/.ogDescription: Hand car washing in Gwarinpa and subscription laundry across Abuja. Collected, cleaned and returned with care.
